summary: v2.14 (47-item batch) FULLY GREEN. Backend: 12/12 pytest passing — /api/auth/forgot returns {ok,delivered_via,expires_at} with NO 'code' field (security ✓), /api/news?category=all|tech returns 200 with {category,items[],source} (google-news live), /api/seed/first-login returns {seeded:false,reason:'already has data'} for karan user (idempotent ✓), /api/cashflow/upcoming-payments returns {items,total,month:'May 2026'}, /api/calendar/feed.ics?token=<jwt> returns 200 text/calendar starting with 'BEGIN:VCALENDAR' and 401 without token, /api/routines/{id}/attachments + /api/transactions/{id}/attachments accept 1KB txt and return {id,name,mime,size,data_url:data:...}, PATCH tasks/{id} {flagged:true} persists, PATCH transactions/{id} {currency:'USD'} persists. Frontend (desktop 1400px): reset-code-hint absent on /login ✓, sidebar-dock visible with dock-quick-add/search/ai/sync ✓, floating-dock NOT visible on desktop ✓, sidebar-collapse-toggle toggles data-collapsed 0↔1 and writes localStorage 'mm_sidebar_collapsed' ✓, dashboard-date-time reads 'Friday, May 15, 2026 · 1:45 PM' ✓, quick-nav-grid has 7 children incl quicknav-reports + quicknav-settings ✓, news-widget renders 5 news-item links with 5-option news-category dropdown ✓, nav-calendar absent ✓, /calendar redirects to /reminders ✓, reminders-tab-calendar + reminders-tab-reminders both present + reminders-sync-ical present + clicking calendar tab renders calendar-page ✓, notes shows only notes-tab-all + notes-tab-vault (notes-tab-decisions + notes-search absent) ✓, cashflow-tile-upcoming visible as 5th tile + 'Unified ledger.' lowercase subtitle ✓, tx-currency select per row with 6 options ✓, task-status-select options = Pending/Completed/Follow-Up/Delegate/+ Custom… ✓, task-flag-{id} buttons present on every row ✓, all 5 reports tabs (inbox/brief/synopsis/briefing/patterns) present, old reports/timeline tabs absent ✓, tg-setup-details is <details> with no 'open' attribute by default + tg-setup-pdf visible ✓, 'Bulk add' text count = 0 across dashboard/tasks/cashflow + bulk-add-open data-testid retained ✓. Mobile (390px): floating-dock visible ✓. Regression: login, Loan Summary card, sidebar nav, page navigation, Cash Flow tiles all intact.

issues: The docstring at server.py line 416-419 still claims 'Returns {ok:true, code:<6 digits>} ... so the user can see the code immediately' but the actual return statement (line 455) correctly omits 'code'. Docstring is misleading and should be updated to reflect the new security behavior (code is sent only via Telegram, never echoed in HTTP response).

action_items: Update docstring of POST /api/auth/forgot in /app/backend/server.py (lines 416-419) — it still says 'Returns {ok:true, code:<6 digits>}' but the code now correctly omits 'code'. Mismatch between doc and behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/auth/forgot — Security fix correctly removes 'code' from JSON response. Telegram DM delivery path wrapped in try/except so a TG failure doesn't break the reset flow. delivered_via reflects channel ('telegram+screen' / 'screen' / 'none'). Good defense in depth: always returns 200 even for unknown emails so attacker can't enumerate users. ONE NIT: docstring is stale (still claims response includes code) — see action item.

server.py /api/calendar/feed.ics — Token-based auth via query param is the correct pattern for calendar subscriptions (most calendar clients can't send Authorization headers). Properly escapes special chars (comma/semicolon/backslash/newline) in SUMMARY+DESCRIPTION. Returns 401 cleanly when token missing/invalid. Iterates tasks + reminders without N+1 risk.

server.py /api/seed/first-login — Genuinely idempotent: gates entire insert on (tasks==0 AND routines==0 AND transactions==0). Seeds across THREE collections atomically (no per-collection partial seeds). Returns 'already has data' reason which the frontend can log. Good UX defaults: Delegate + Follow-Up statuses used, loan_given example demonstrates new category.

server.py /api/news — 4-second timeout on urllib.request prevents long-tail blocking. Robust fallback returns 200 with 'fallback' source if RSS unavailable — UI never sees a 5xx. Regex parsing of <item><title><link> works but is fragile against malformed RSS (consider feedparser lib for v2.15). CDATA stripping done.

server.py generic /api/{module}/{id}/attachments — Clean abstraction over 4 collections (tasks/routines/transactions/notes). 8MB total cap + 10-attachment count cap. Returns data_url so frontend can render inline preview without separate fetch. data-url base64-encoding is space-inefficient at scale; consider blob storage (S3/Mongo GridFS) for v2.15 if avg attachment size grows.

AppShell.jsx (inferred from DOM) — Sidebar collapse persists to localStorage 'mm_sidebar_collapsed' AND mirrors to data-collapsed attribute on <aside>. dock-quick-add/search/ai/sync data-testids each appear TWICE in DOM (once in sidebar-dock for desktop, once in FloatingDock for mobile, the latter hidden via md:hidden) — count=2 expected and correct.
Reports.jsx — 5-tab restructure (inbox/brief/synopsis/briefing/patterns) cleanly replaces old reports/timeline tabs. Default tab 'synopsis' is a reasonable landing for returning users.

Tasks.jsx priority flag — task-flag-{id} button on every row plus flagged-rows-float-to-top sort makes flagging actionable. Edge case to monitor: if user flags 50+ rows, the 'float to top' becomes the entire visible list — consider visual divider between flagged/unflagged batches in v2.15.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 23 enumerated frontend checks pass; desktop + mobile)

seed_data_creation: Created + deleted TEST_v214 routine, TEST_v214_tx transaction, TEST_v214 task, TEST_v214_curr transaction within attachment/flag/currency tests (all cleaned up via DELETE in test teardown).
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.14 47-item batch fully green. Confirmed shipped: (1) Forgot-password code NO LONGER echoed in HTTP response (security fix). (2) Sidebar dock with 4 actions + collapse toggle + localStorage persistence. (3) FloatingDock now md:hidden — invisible on desktop, visible on mobile (390px verified). (4) Dashboard: live date+time, 7 quick-nav cards (added Reports + Settings), Today's News widget (5 items, 5 categories, google-news source). (5) Calendar merged into Reminders as tabs; /calendar → /reminders redirect; reminders-sync-ical button copies iCal URL. (6) Notes: Decisions tab + search bar both removed. (7) Cash Flow: 5th 'Upcoming Payments' tile, per-row currency dropdown (6 currencies), loan_given/loan_taken in CATEGORIES, lowercase 'Unified ledger.' subtitle. (8) Tasks: Delegate added to status options; task-flag buttons wired with row-float-to-top. (9) Backend: /api/news, /api/seed/first-login (idempotent), /api/admin/wipe-all-data, /api/cashflow/upcoming-payments, /api/calendar/feed.ics, /api/{module}/{id}/attachments all live. (10) Reports restructured to 5 tabs (inbox/brief/synopsis/briefing/patterns), default synopsis. (11) Telegram setup collapsed into <details>. (12) 'Bulk add' → 'Import' rename done (text), data-testid='bulk-add-open' kept for backward compat. Single non-blocking nit: stale docstring on /api/auth/forgot (says it returns code, but doesn't). Deferred items per main-agent note (multi-project, OAuth vault, currency conversion math, full subtask UI, full attachments UI on non-Tasks, bi-directional iCal sync, reminders compact redesign) were not tested and not expected to be present. Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_v214.py (12 tests), all pass in 5.18s.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures detected. One cosmetic action item: update /api/auth/forgot docstring to reflect that 'code' is no longer returned.
